title: Midnight Soy Milk Panna Cotta
description: A creamy and smooth dessert made with soy milk and baked to perfection. Perfect for a midnight craving.

ingredients.name: Unflavored gelatin
ingredients.notes: soak in 1 cup of milk for 5 minutes

instructions: Soak the gelatin in 1 cup of milk for 5 minutes.
In a medium saucepan, combine the soy milk, aerated sugar, and Dutch process cocoa powder.
Whisk the mixture over medium heat until the sugar has dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat.
Add the soaked gelatin to the saucepan and whisk until dissolved.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large baking dish.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes or until set.
Chill the panna cotta in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours.
